name: claude-to-codex-migration
description: Public-safe staged Claude Code to Codex migration workflow for AGENTS.md, profiles, skills, hooks, and MCP.

interface.shortDescription: Move Claude Code harness patterns into Codex.
interface.longDescription: A public-safe staged workflow for translating Claude Code harness surfaces into Codex AGENTS.md policy, profiles, reusable skills, deterministic hooks, and MCP/tooling decisions without exposing private prompts or proprietary implementation details.
defaultPrompt: Map this Claude Code setup into Codex.
Audit my Codex harness migration plan.
